themeName: Needle Drop at Sea: A Vinyl & Listening Voyage

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: Brand-first condensed grotesk, upper-titlecase with relaxed tracking; sturdy, album-spine energy.
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: Calm humanist sans, sentence case, generous line-height for night-reading comfort.

visual.imageryMood: Ocean-first stillness with analog warmth: glassy fjords, blue-hour cobalt, and hushed lounges where a single pop of album-art color lives inside a largely cinematic, quiet frame.
visual.lightingStyle: Blue-hour exteriors with soft arctic twilight; interior pools of candle-warm practical light; low-contrast, filmic with gentle halation and a hint of grainânever nightclub-bright, never stage-lit.
visual.compositionNotes: Favor horizon-led wides, rail-side silhouettes, and window reflections that echo a recordâs circle. Keep tables clean and uncluttered; one subtle cue at most (a sleeve edge, an enamel pin, a coaster). Lounge shots should read as travel-restful firstâdeep chairs, side profile conversation, a glass catching warm light. Use negative space and simple geometry (squares/circles) that nod to album art without staging a display. Avoid gear-forward scenes, signage, or anything that feels like a pop-up venue.
avoidList: Crowded group tableaux or staged swaps dominating the room
DJ towers, club lighting rigs, or big turntables on open decks
Merch tables, banners, or vendor-style racks
Busy tabletops with crates of records or cables
Any shot where the shipâs lounges read as a festival or classroom
referenceMoodboard: Blue Note-era cover geometry translated to sea blues
ECM-style Nordic minimal photography (mist, negative space)
Edge-class glass-and-steel curves at blue hour
1960s hiâfi ad restraintâclean lines, one hero object
Scandi lounge lighting: brass, low warm pools
Album-sleeve color pops: tomato red, acid yellow, electric cyan

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Music shows up as a guest-carried, atmosphere-level layer within normal cruise lifeâsubtle cues and soft-play moments that never overpower ocean-first travel.
cruiseNativeMoments: Rail-side sunset watch on the promenade
Quiet coffee at a window bar watching wake trails
Blue-hour cocktail in a low-lit lounge
Slow morning on a balcony with robe and blanket
Top-deck night walk under faint twilight
Two friends chatting in armchairs with sea passing by
nicheEnhancedMoments: A single record sleeve tucked on a lap during a window sit, later passed to a friend with a grin
Era-hint wardrobe (â80s collar line, â90s cap, label pin) meeting blue-hour cocktails
A bartender sliding a vinyl-themed coaster under a drinkâno extra fanfare
A pocket-size mini zine with track notes exchanged after dessert
A low-pressure, passing hand-to-hand trade at a shared table on a sea dayâone gem for another, then back to the view
A favorite album side playing quietly in the background while guests converse at normal volume
implausibleLiteralizations: Any scene resembling a DJ/production bootcamp
Full-room listening commanded by a host with a microphone
Gear shootouts or A/B tech tests with note-taking
Large consoles, road cases, or stacks of speakers in public areas
allowedProps: Single record sleeve or 7" in a tote
Lightweight on-ear headphones (one person, not a crowd)
Enamel pins or small label patches on jackets
Matchbook-sized mini zine with track notes
Simple cassette or phone showing album art (kept discreet)
discouragedProps: Turntable flight cases, multiple decks, mixers
PA stacks, lighting trusses, fog machines
Signage stands, table tents, or lanyard systems
Crates or bulk stacks of records

messaging.heroSlogan: Let the AâSide be the horizon.
messaging.subSlogan: A vinyl-and-listening voyage through the Norwegian Fjords and Arctic Circle.

ctaVariants.share: Pass the vibe to a friend

messaging.elevatorPitch: Analog warmth meets open water. Over 12 nights in the Norwegian Fjords & Arctic Circle, we lean into blue hour, calm lounges, and easy music discovery that fits naturally into ship life. The ship hums as usualânow and then a wellâtimed side drifts in the background, a friendly hand-to-hand trade happens at a shared table, or a tiny zine changes what you queue next. Itâs ocean-first, quietly social, and designed for travelers who like their recommendations with a view.
messaging.voicePersona: A soft-spoken curator who knows the shipâs corners and the deep cutsânever pushy, always sea-calibrated.

merch.conceptStatement: Wearable winks that blend hiâfi love with fjord calm: album-cover geometry, horizon grooves, and midnight-lounge typography in 1â2 colors for clean, POD-ready prints.

merch.logoConceptDescription: Wordmark: NEEDLE DROP AT SEA set in a condensed grotesk with generous tracking; the âOâ becomes a porthole-record (tiny spindle notch), underlined by a low horizon line.
merch.tagline: Let the AâSide be the horizon.
merch.printStyle: 1â2 color screenprint, vector shapes, halftone-free, water-based inks where possible.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Blue hour settles across the water. Steel-blue turns to velvet, and the ship moves like a steady breath. You lean into the glass, hear the room soften, feel the first hint of a groove. No rushâjust horizon, a quiet nod, and the kind of recommendation that travels hand to hand. Tonight the ocean carries the A-side, and every turn feels like discovery, threaded through warm light and fjord silhouettes. Let the record be the view, and the view be the record.
audio.hypeClipScript: Blue hour. A quiet nod. The room softens. A sleeve, a smile, a first noteâhorizon. Trade a gem, find a new favorite, and let the A-side be the sea.
audio.voiceProfile: Warm, close-mic, lightly textured alto or baritone; global-neutral accent; gentle tape-like saturation; intimate but unhurried pacing.
audio.musicMood: Coastal ambient and downtempo soulâwarm Rhodes, soft breakbeats, rounded bass, brushed percussion; subtle vinyl texture; no big drops, no commanding vocalsâinviting, conversation-safe energy.

tiktokOrganic.hook: What if the Aâside was outside?

narrative.title: Earbud at the Rail
narrative.scriptOrNarration: Blue hour settles. Two friends lean on the rail, one earbud shared. A glance, a nod. Whisper: âPress play?â Wake lines carry the downbeat. On-screen text: Let the AâSide be the horizon.
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Cruise-first. Horizon-led wide of promenade; fjord walls drifting by. Side-by-side posture is the signalâno gear on screen. One jacket shows a tiny enamel pin; wind lifts a cuff. Low halation, warm brass spill from an interior door behind. Keep frames uncluttered; the ocean is the hero.
narrative.backgroundDescription: Promenade deck at blue hour with calm water and distant fjord silhouettes.
narrative.musicMood: Coastal ambient with soft Rhodes and brushed percussionâconversation-safe, no big drops.

tiktokOrganic.caption: A quiet nod, one song, all that water. Let the AâSide be the horizon.

No sleeves or gearâjust water, hands, and an easy laugh. Subtle wardrobe cue: BlueâHour Listener Club tee under a jacket.
instagramReels.audioTrackType: Original coastal ambient bed with soft vinyl texture, no vocals.
instagramReels.caption: Glass like a record. Wake like a groove. Ocean-first, music in the margins.

carouselSlides.headline: Let the AâSide be the horizon.

carouselSlides.bodyText: Norwegian Fjords & Arctic Circle. Analog warmth, ocean calm.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Balcony morning, robe and blanket, coffee steaming; horizon-first with negative space.

youtubeShort.description: Ocean-first calm with a vinyl-quiet wink. Norwegian Fjords & Arctic Circleâmusic woven into the view. Let the AâSide be the horizon.

emailHeader.subjectLine: Blue hour is calling. AâSide: Horizon.

discordBanner.welcomeMessageDirection: Keep it sea-forward and friendly. Share a #now-playing and #portday-viewsâwindow photos and easy recs welcome.

heroExplainer.title: Let the AâSide be the horizon â Brand Film
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: Blue hour settles across the water. Steel-blue turns to velvet, and the ship moves like a steady breath. You lean into the glass, hear the room soften, feel the first hint of a groove. No rushâjust horizon, a quiet nod, and the kind of recommendation that travels hand to hand. Tonight the ocean carries the A-side, and every turn feels like discovery, threaded through warm light and fjord silhouettes. Let the record be the view, and the view be the record.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Cruise-first sequence: 1) Wide of fjord wake at blue hour. 2) Lounge armchairs in warm brass light, soft conversationâno gear. 3) Bartender slides a vinyl-inspired coaster under a glass (single accent, no staging). 4) Balcony morning with robe/blanket, coffee and slow page-turn. 5) Promenade rail walkâside-by-side posture and a shared smile. 6) A matchbook-sized mini zine passed near dessert. 7) Final horizon with subtle tomato-red sun disk. Filmic grain, gentle halation, negative space.
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: Norwegian fjords and arctic twilight exteriors; interior lounges with candle-warm pools of light.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Coastal ambient and downtempo soulâwarm Rhodes, rounded bass, brushed percussion; no commanding vocals.

tiktokSeed.title: Porthole Loop

tiktokSeed.visualDirectionNotes: Architectural cue leads: porthole/window geometry echoing a record. No tabletop objects. Soft breath, jacket sleeve detail, sea beyond.
